agents.name: mobile-developer
agents.description: Expert in React Native and Flutter mobile development. Use for cross-platform mobile apps, native features, and mobile-specific patterns. Triggers on mobile, react native, flutter, ios, android, app store, expo.

agents.name: project-planner
agents.description: Smart project planning agent. Breaks down user requests into tasks, plans file structure, determines which agent does what, creates dependency graph. Use when starting new projects or planning major features.

agents.name: security-auditor
agents.description: Elite cybersecurity expert. Think like an attacker, defend like an expert. OWASP 2025, supply chain security, zero trust architecture. Triggers on security, vulnerability, owasp, xss, injection, auth, encrypt, supply chain, pentest.

agents.name: skill-librarian
agents.description: The "Brain" of Progressive Disclosure. Identifies required expertise based on user intent and dynamically loads/unloads skills.

agents.name: performance-optimizer
agents.description: Expert in performance optimization, profiling, Core Web Vitals, and bundle optimization. Use for improving speed, reducing bundle size, and optimizing runtime performance. Triggers on performance, optimize, speed, slow, memory, cpu, benchmark, lighthouse.

agents.name: test-engineer
agents.description: Expert in testing, TDD, and test automation. Use for writing tests, improving coverage, debugging test failures. Triggers on test, spec, coverage, jest, pytest, playwright, e2e, unit test.

agents.name: penetration-tester
agents.description: Expert in offensive security, penetration testing, red team operations, and vulnerability exploitation. Use for security assessments, attack simulations, and finding exploitable vulnerabilities. Triggers on pentest, exploit, attack, hack, breach, pwn, redteam, offensive.

agents.name: debugger
agents.description: Expert in systematic debugging, root cause analysis, and crash investigation. Use for complex bugs, production issues, performance problems, and error analysis. Triggers on bug, error, crash, not working, broken, investigate, fix.

agents.name: explorer-agent
agents.description: Advanced codebase discovery, deep architectural analysis, and proactive research agent. The eyes and ears of the framework. Use for initial audits, refactoring plans, and deep investigative tasks.

agents.name: database-architect
agents.description: Expert database architect for schema design, query optimization, migrations, and modern serverless databases. Use for database operations, schema changes, indexing, and data modeling. Triggers on database, sql, schema, migration, query, postgres, index, table.

agents.name: documentation-writer
agents.description: Expert in technical documentation. Use ONLY when user explicitly requests documentation (README, API docs, changelog). DO NOT auto-invoke during normal development.

agents.name: quality-gatekeeper
agents.description: Mandatory review layer, validating agent outputs against the GEMINI.md standards before finalizing any task.

agents.name: seo-specialist
agents.description: SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) expert. Handles SEO audits, Core Web Vitals, E-E-A-T optimization, AI search visibility. Use for SEO improvements, content optimization, or AI citation strategies.

agents.name: frontend-specialist
agents.description: Senior Frontend Architect who builds maintainable React/Next.js systems with performance-first mindset. Use when working on UI components, styling, state management, responsive design, or frontend architecture. Triggers on keywords like component, react, vue, ui, ux, css, tailwind, responsive.

agents.name: game-developer
agents.description: Game development across all platforms (PC, Web, Mobile, VR/AR). Use when building games with Unity, Godot, Unreal, Phaser, Three.js, or any game engine. Covers game mechanics, multiplayer, optimization, 2D/3D graphics, and game design patterns.

agents.name: backend-specialist
agents.description: Expert backend architect for Node.js, Python, and modern serverless/edge systems. Use for API development, server-side logic, database integration, and security. Triggers on backend, server, api, endpoint, database, auth.

agents.name: context-architect
agents.description: Manages the context window to prevent "token bloat" and ensures high-priority information is always preserved.

agents.name: orchestrator
agents.description: Multi-agent coordination and task orchestration. Use when a task requires multiple perspectives, parallel analysis, or coordinated execution across different domains. Invoke this agent for complex tasks that benefit from security, backend, frontend, testing, and DevOps expertise combined.

agents.name: devops-engineer
agents.description: Expert in deployment, server management, CI/CD, and production operations. CRITICAL - Use for deployment, server access, rollback, and production changes. HIGH RISK operations. Triggers on deploy, production, server, pm2, ssh, release, rollback, ci/cd.

core.name: brainstorming
core.description: Socratic questioning protocol + user communication. MANDATORY for complex requests, new features, or unclear requirements. Includes progress reporting and error handling.

core.name: plan-writing
core.description: Structured task planning with clear breakdowns, dependencies, and verification criteria. Use when implementing features, refactoring, or any multi-step work.

core.name: parallel-agents
core.description: Multi-agent orchestration patterns. Use when multiple independent tasks can run with different domain expertise or when comprehensive analysis requires multiple perspectives.

core.name: architecture
core.description: Architectural decision-making framework. Requirements analysis, trade-off evaluation, ADR documentation. Use when making architecture decisions or analyzing system design.

core.name: behavioral-modes
core.description: AI operational modes (brainstorm, implement, debug, review, teach, ship, orchestrate). Use to adapt behavior based on task type.

core.name: context-management
core.description: Principles for context window optimization and MVC (Minimal Viable Context).

core.name: skill-loading
core.description: Logic for dynamic skill activation and discovery (JIT Knowledge).

core.name: clean-code
core.description: Pragmatic coding standards - concise, direct, no over-engineering, no unnecessary comments

tech.name: mcp-builder
tech.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server building principles. Tool design, resource patterns, best practices. Triggers on: mcp, tool, resource, server, protocol.

tech.name: react-patterns
tech.description: Modern React patterns and principles. Hooks, composition, performance, TypeScript best practices. Triggers on: react, hooks, component, jsx, tsx, state, props.

tech.name: docker-expert
tech.description: Docker containerization expert with deep knowledge of multi-stage builds, image optimization, container security, Docker Compose orchestration, and production deployment patterns. Triggers on: docker, container, image, compose, k8s, kubernetes, devops.

tech.name: tailwind-patterns
tech.description: Tailwind CSS v4 principles. CSS-first configuration, container queries, modern patterns, design token architecture. Triggers on: tailwind, css, style, design, theme.

tech.name: nodejs-best-practices
tech.description: Node.js development principles and decision-making. Framework selection, async patterns, security, and architecture. Triggers on: node, javascript, backend, express, fastify.

tech.name: nestjs-expert
tech.description: Nest.js framework expert specializing in module architecture, dependency injection, middleware, guards, interceptors, testing with Jest/Supertest, TypeORM/Mongoose integration, and Passport.js authentication. Triggers on: nest, nestjs, controller, service, module.

tech.name: python-patterns
tech.description: Python development principles and decision-making. Framework selection, async patterns, type hints, project structure. Triggers on: python, flask, django, fastapi, pip, poetry.

tech.name: database-design
tech.description: Database design principles and decision-making. Schema design, indexing strategy, ORM selection, serverless databases. Triggers on: database, sql, postgres, mongodb, schema, index.

tech.name: typescript-expert
tech.description: TypeScript and JavaScript expert with deep knowledge of type-level programming, performance optimization, monorepo management, migration strategies, and modern tooling. Triggers on: typescript, ts, types, interfaces, generics.

tech.name: mobile-design
tech.description: Mobile-first design thinking and decision-making for iOS and Android apps. Touch interaction, performance patterns, platform conventions. Triggers on: mobile, ios, android, rn, flutter.

tech.name: golang-best-practices
tech.description: Expert Go (Golang) patterns, concurrency models, error handling, and project layout standards. Triggers on: go, golang, goroutine, channel, struct.

tech.name: prisma-expert
tech.description: Prisma ORM expert for schema design, migrations, query optimization, relations modeling, and database operations. Triggers on: prisma, orm, migration, schema.

tech.name: api-patterns
tech.description: API design principles and decision-making. REST vs GraphQL vs tRPC selection, response formats, versioning, pagination. Triggers on: api, rest, graphql, trpc, endpoint.

tech.name: game-development
tech.description: Game development orchestrator. Routes to platform-specific skills based on project needs. Triggers on: game, unity, unreal, godot, phaser, threejs.

tech.name: nextjs-best-practices
tech.description: Next.js App Router principles. Server Components, data fetching, routing patterns. Triggers on: next, nextjs, rsc, app router, turbopack.

process.name: seo-fundamentals
process.description: SEO fundamentals, E-E-A-T, Core Web Vitals, and Google algorithm principles. Triggers on: seo, search, ranking, vitals, google.

process.name: review-pre-commit-git
process.description: Standardized pre-commit code review process using V4 Prompt Template. Triggers on: pre-commit, staged, git review, commit.

process.name: lint-and-validate
process.description: Automatic quality control, linting, and static analysis procedures. Use after every code modification to ensure syntax correctness and project standards. Triggers on: lint, format, check, validate, types, static analysis.

process.name: performance-profiling
process.description: Performance profiling principles. Measurement, analysis, and optimization techniques. Triggers on: performance, profiling, speed, slow, memory.

process.name: testing-patterns
process.description: Testing patterns and principles. Unit, integration, mocking strategies. Triggers on: test, unit, integration, mock, jest, pytest.

process.name: red-team-tactics
process.description: Red team tactics principles based on MITRE ATT&CK. Attack phases, detection evasion, reporting. Triggers on: redteam, attack, exploit, pentest, mitre.

process.name: server-management
process.description: Server management principles and decision-making. Process management, monitoring strategy, and scaling decisions. Triggers on: server, linux, ssh, pm2, monitor, scale.

process.name: bash-linux
process.description: Bash/Linux terminal patterns. Critical commands, piping, error handling, scripting. Triggers on: bash, linux, shell, terminal, script.

process.name: powershell-windows
process.description: PowerShell Windows patterns. Critical pitfalls, operator syntax, error handling. Triggers on: powershell, windows, posh, script.

process.name: geo-fundamentals
process.description: Generative Engine Optimization for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity). Triggers on: geo, ai search, perplexity, chatgpt visibility.

process.name: i18n-localization
process.description: Internationalization and localization patterns. Detecting hardcoded strings, managing translations, locale files, RTL support. Triggers on: i18n, l10n, translation, locale, rtl.

process.name: systematic-debugging
process.description: 4-phase systematic debugging methodology with root cause analysis and evidence-based verification. Triggers on: debug, bug, root cause, fix, investigation.

process.name: vulnerability-scanner
process.description: Advanced vulnerability analysis principles. OWASP 2025, Supply Chain Security, attack surface mapping, risk prioritization. Triggers on: vulnerability, scanner, owasp, security, risk.

process.name: documentation-templates
process.description: Documentation templates and structure guidelines. README, API docs, code comments, and AI-friendly documentation. Triggers on: docs, readme, api documentation, comments.

process.name: frontend-design
process.description: Design thinking and decision-making for web UI. Use when designing components, layouts, color schemes, typography, or creating aesthetic interfaces. Triggers on: design, ui, ux, color, typography, layout.

process.name: ux-ui-pro
process.description: Advanced UI/UX design standards for "Pro" level aesthetics. Triggers on: design, ui, ux, pro design, modern interface, premium design.

process.name: tdd-workflow
process.description: Test-Driven Development workflow principles. RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle. Triggers on: tdd, red-green-refactor, test-driven.

process.name: webapp-testing
process.description: Web application testing principles. E2E, Playwright, deep audit strategies. Triggers on: e2e, playwright, browser test, webapp testing.

process.name: deployment-procedures
process.description: Production deployment principles and decision-making. Safe deployment workflows, rollback strategies, and verification. Triggers on: deploy, production, release, rollback.

process.name: code-review-checklist
process.description: Code review guidelines covering code quality, security, and best practices. Triggers on: review, code review, checklist, audit.

custom.name: app-builder
custom.description: Main application building orchestrator. Creates full-stack applications from natural language requests. Determines project type, selects tech stack, coordinates agents.
